scripts.repo/clean: lerna clean -y && lerna run clean && lerna exec 'node ../../scripts/rm.mjs dist'
scripts.repo/test-dev-rspack: pnpm run with-rspack pnpm run test-dev-inner
scripts.repo/test-dev-experimental-rspack: pnpm run with-rspack pnpm run test-dev-experimental-inner
scripts.repo/test-dev-experimental-turbo: pnpm run with-turbo pnpm run with-experimental pnpm test-dev-inner
scripts.repo/test-start-webpack: pnpm run with-webpack pnpm run test-start-inner
scripts.repo/test-start-experimental-webpack: pnpm run with-webpack pnpm run test-start-experimental-inner
scripts.repo/test-start-rspack: pnpm run with-rspack pnpm run test-start-inner
scripts.repo/test-start-experimental-rspack: pnpm run with-rspack pnpm run test-start-experimental-inner
scripts.repo/test-start-experimental-turbo: pnpm run with-turbo pnpm run with-experimental pnpm test-start-experimental-inner
scripts.repo/testonly-dev-webpack: pnpm run with-webpack pnpm run testonly-dev-inner
scripts.repo/testonly-dev-rspack: pnpm run with-rspack pnpm run testonly-dev-inner
scripts.repo/testonly-start-webpack: pnpm run with-webpack pnpm run testonly-start-inner
scripts.repo/testonly-start-rspack: pnpm run with-rspack pnpm run testonly-start-inner
scripts.repo/testonly-deploy-webpack: pnpm run with-webpack pnpm run testonly-deploy-inner
scripts.repo/test-webpack: pnpm run with-webpack pnpm run test-inner
scripts.repo/test-rspack: pnpm run with-rspack pnpm run test-inner
scripts.repo/lint: run-p test-types lint-typescript prettier-check "lint-eslint ." lint-ast-grep lint-language check-unused-turbo-tasks
scripts.repo/next-no-sourcemaps: echo 'No longer supported. Use `pnpm next --disable-source-maps` instead'; exit 1;
scripts.repo/clean-trace-jaeger: node scripts/rm.mjs test/integration/basic/.next && TRACE_TARGET=JAEGER pnpm next build test/integration/basic
scripts.repo/update-error-codes: cd packages/next && pnpm taskr compile check_error_codes
scripts.github-pages/deploy: next build && touch out/.nojekyll && git add out/ && git commit -m "Deploy" && git subtree push --prefix out origin gh-pages
scripts.cms-sanity/presetup: echo 'about to setup env variables, follow the guide here: https://github.com/vercel/next.js/tree/canary/examples/cms-sanity#using-the-sanity-cli'
scripts.cms-sanity/postsetup: echo 'create the read token by following the rest of the guide: https://github.com/vercel/next.js/tree/canary/examples/cms-sanity#creating-a-read-token'
scripts.cms-sanity/typegen: sanity schema extract && sanity typegen generate
scripts.with-electron-typescript/build: npm run build-renderer && npm run build-electron
scripts.with-firebase-hosting/serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions,hosting
scripts.legacy-config/multi: next lint; next build; next lint --fix
scripts.flat-config-flat-compat-with-other-compa: next lint; next build; next lint --fix
scripts.flat-config-flat-compat/multi: next lint; next build; next lint --fix
scripts.flat-config/multi: next lint; next build; next lint --fix
scripts.next-swc/build-native: napi build --platform -p next-napi-bindings --cargo-cwd ../../ --cargo-name next_napi_bindings --features plugin,image-extended --js false native
scripts.next-swc/build-native-release: napi build --platform -p next-napi-bindings --cargo-cwd ../../ --cargo-name next_napi_bindings --release --features plugin,image-extended,tracing/release_max_level_trace --js false native
scripts.next-swc/build-native-release-with-asser: napi build --platform -p next-napi-bindings --cargo-cwd ../../ --cargo-name next_napi_bindings --profile release-with-assertions --features plugin,image-extended,tracing/release_max_level_trace --js false native
scripts.next-swc/build-native-no-plugin: napi build --platform -p next-napi-bindings --cargo-cwd ../../ --cargo-name next_napi_bindings --features image-webp --js false native
scripts.next-swc/build-native-no-plugin-release: napi build --platform -p next-napi-bindings --cargo-cwd ../../ --cargo-name next_napi_bindings --release --features image-webp,tracing/release_max_level_trace --js false native
scripts.next-swc/build-native-wasi: npx --package=@napi-rs/cli@3.0.0-alpha.45 napi build --platform --target wasm32-wasip1-threads -p next-napi-bindings --cwd ../../ --output-dir packages/next-swc/native --no-default-features
scripts.next-swc/test-cargo-unit: cargo nextest run --workspace --exclude next-napi-bindings --exclude turbo-tasks-macros --cargo-profile release-with-assertions --no-fail-fast
scripts.font/build: node ../../scripts/rm.mjs dist && pnpm ncc-fontkit && tsc -d -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.needs-triage/build: pnpm types && ncc build lib/index.js -m -o dist --license licenses.txt
scripts.validate-docs-links/build: pnpm types && ncc build src/index.ts -m -o ./dist --license licenses.txt
scripts.nested-deps-app-router-many-pages/prepar: rimraf components app && fuzzponent -d 2 -s 206 -o components && node ./create-pages.mjs
scripts.rendering/start: NODE_ENV=production pnpm build-application && NODE_ENV=production next start
scripts.non-root-project-monorepo/build: pnpm i && pnpm run --dir apps/web build
scripts.non-root-project-monorepo/dev: pnpm i && pnpm run --dir apps/web dev
scripts.nx-handling/repro: rm -rf dist && npm run build && npm run start
